privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified. The task configures a Sygic Aura GPS unit from a personal sedan profile to a work van profile for utility field service operations. Injected errors include: vehicle type CAR→VAN, fuel GAS→DIESEL, speed 180→100-120 km/h, routing Shortest→Fastest, tolls allowed→forbidden, unpaved access disabled→enabled, and locations changed from shopping mall (29.7744, -95.5560) to company yard (29.7250, -95.2600) and restaurant (29.7455, -95.3937) to Deer Park industrial area (29.7000, -95.1240). SOC code 49-9012 correctly identifies Control and Valve Installers and Repairers occupation. Expected coordinates verified near real Houston locations: Lawndale Street area near Ship Channel for company operations and Deer Park petrochemical complex for field work. Coordinate tolerance 0.15 degrees and pass threshold 55/100 confirmed in verifier.
